concepts.finding:
Our main contribution is two-fold: First, we formulate conver-
sion prediction as a multi-task learning problem and propose MT-
FwFM to solve all tasks jointly.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

concepts.finding:
Our experiment results show that, compared with two
state-of-the-art models, MT-FwFM improve the AUC by 0.74% and
0.84% on two conversion types, and the weighted AUC across all
conversion types is also improved by 0.50%.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

3
MULTI-TASK FIELD-WEIGHTED
FACTORIZATION MACHINE
We formulate the prediction of different types of conversions as a
multi-task learning problem, and propose Multi-Task Field-weighted
Factorization Machine (MT-FwFM) to train these models jointly.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:
7
CONCLUSION
In this paper, we formulate conversion prediction as a Multi-Task
learning problem and propose Multi-Task Field-weighted Factoriza-
tion Machines (MT-FwFM) to learn prediction models for multiple
conversion types jointly.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems
